channel.title: Comments for page "The Unforgiving Gridiron"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Unforgiving Gridiron"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh shit this is still a thing. Hell yeah.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I came here, thinking "Why is someone talking about penis sleeves" and getting ready to staffpost.

I found a kick ass tale.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: SPORTBALL! I don't think i know what i read, but it involved sports and balls and penis sleeves. What ever it was, i think i'll be fine as long as i don't piss off coach panagakos, eldest and most revered.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
that little eldritch minx who thinks she’s a football coach

Sure, why not.

+1

Alexylvan football is hilarious tho. I’m looking forward to future instalments.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
OH NO CLIFFHANGER D:

Can’t have a man walking around out there in a tunic without a penis sleeve. Might catch the penis pneumonia.

What. Madman of Portlandia indeed.

Well, Football in the Future never looked this good. :) We need more AU versions of GoIs. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
How dare you make the esteemed Sasha Merlo into a GNOME!!! >:V

In all seriousness this is a fun and silly read that I can't help but admire. Alexylva's football is about as close to the real thing as Quidditch is to soccer, but the fact that it still maintains an internal logic is hilarious.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Part four in this silly series about Alexylva, robots, and football. Thanks to everyone who looked at this in chat, and thanks to conwell for inspiring like, half the characters at this point.

With any luck, I'll finish this series before the current season is over. This is pretty fun to write for so why not.
